description_long: This marble sculpture depicts a central, muscular male figure surrounded by three smaller, more delicate figures, likely children, who cling to or are supported by the central figure. The composition is dynamic, with the figures arranged in a semi-circular grouping, creating a sense of movement and emotional connection. The central figure kneels on one knee atop a rectangular plinth, with his arms outstretched to embrace or support the children. The sculpting style is highly detailed, with careful attention to anatomical features, drapery, and facial expressions, conveying a sense of protection and care. The surface is smooth and polished, typical of classical marble statuary, and the entire group is carved from a single block of stone. The base is simple and unadorned, serving to elevate and focus attention on the figures above.
description: A detailed marble sculpture of a kneeling male figure surrounded by three children, all carved in a realistic and expressive style atop a rectangular plinth.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the central male figure kneeling with arms outstretched, embracing three children who cluster around him.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the central figure and the children, with the drapery and body contours more visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the figures, with the central figure's broad shoulders and the arrangement of the children around him.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the side profiles of the figures, showing the children’s forms and the flowing lines of the composition.
attribute_subject_matter: a kneeling male figure surrounded by three children
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
